nasb.text: You shall give the right thigh to the priest as a contribution from the sacrifices of your peace offerings.

esv.text: And the right thigh you shall give to the priest as a contribution from the sacrifice of your peace offerings.

cnv.text: 你們要從平安祭牲中，拿右後腿來作舉祭，奉給祭司。

ccb.text: 你们要把祭牲的右腿献为举祭，归给祭司。
